title: 2 newcomers take on Syracuse Common Council’s longest-serving member: Meet the candidates
summary: Democratic primary race for Syracuse Common Council seat features two political newcomers challenging the city's longest-serving elected official. The article announces candidate competition for an open council position.

political_signal.description: Electoral competition for Common Council seat with incumbent longest-serving member facing primary challenge from newcomers; signals potential leadership transition.
